name: google-seo
description: Audit and improve websites using Google Search Central guidance for technical SEO, content quality, indexing, and search appearance.

interface.shortDescription: Audit Google SEO, indexing, content, and search appearance
interface.longDescription: Audit and improve crawlability, indexing, canonical signals, metadata, JavaScript rendering, mobile-first indexing, structured data, people-first content, and generative AI search visibility using Google Search Central guidance.
defaultPrompt: Audit this website against Google Search Central guidance.
Diagnose why these pages are not being indexed by Google.
Review this implementation for technical SEO and content-quality issues.
